3228670.name: ImmersiX - Introduction to V-Nova PresenZ
3228670.description:
Experience the Future of Cinema with V-Nova PresenZ

Dive into the revolutionary world of 6DoF (six degrees of freedom) video with V-Nova PresenZ. This groundbreaking format transforms cinematic storytelling, allowing you to move freely within the scene and explore stories from entirely new perspectives.

This video introduces you to the unparalleled immersion and detail that only 6DoF can deliver. Experience the sensation of stepping inside the action, surrounded by vivid environments and lifelike visuals.

Prepare to reimagine what’s possible in visual storytelling. With V-Nova PresenZ, the future is yours to explore.

Live Within.
3228670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
